title: Diagonal Perfect Rails 3D PBR
description: Curved rails now go 45 degrees straight! Minecarts now run smoothly on continuous curved rails! Now support PBR and Create Mod!
body:
### 🎉Thank you for 50k downloads! 🎉 --- ## The Design Philosophy ![No more twisty rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90b04ec76b549a07b1423ab31b51a35466c5b876.png) ### Curved rails do not match the actual movement In Minecraft, minecarts run 45 degrees straight on continuous curved rails. However, the vanilla texture produces a twisty pattern for the continuous curved rails. This pack fixed that by making the curved rails diagonal-perfect. Now the rails fit the motion of minecarts! ![Reinforced ramp rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969b083c659f443be16eef052f607acb8da15846.png) ### Reinforced ramp rails The vanilla models of the ramp rails look fragile since they lack support. This pack fixed that by adding wooden frames under the ramp rails. ![Variants rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GpbiI09r/images/376057317305fab34e5043f3d720a27e47efb31d.png) ### Redesigned vanilla rails The powered rail is crafted from gold instead of iron, so the rail has a pure gold texture. The activator rail, when powered, will make the minecart wobble, so the model matches that by having two bumps on the rail. ![LabPBR support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GpbiI09r/images/0a35ef139711de24a2c42c2d024274a7b8f3dbd9.jpeg) ### Shiny rails With LabPBR-supported shaders, the rails look more realistic. ## Create Mod Support ![Readable controller rails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GpbiI09r/images/faaba966a4b6b6cb97b4627171c6661a45e53baf.gif) ### Readable controller rails Controller rails are installed with dynamic LED displays! The speed settings of the rails are more readable. Moreover, the aesthetic of the segment displays fits [Immersive Redstone Display](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-redstone-display). Please check it out! ![Rail installed with a cart assembler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GpbiI09r/images/8b8be715f2d555ac65c64fd728024db4b86058d0.jpeg) ### "Disconnected" rails under a cart assembler Since the rail installed with a cart assembler does not receive power from connected rails, even if they have the same type, the redstone power line in the middle of the rail track does not connect to the power line of the contiguous rail track. ## Feature & Version-support Requests Are Welcome! You could issue feature or version-support requests via the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/GrakePch/DiagonalPerfectRails/issues) of this project! --- ### Related Projects
Diagonal Perfect Copper Grates
